narrative:
Ashland County has 33,432 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.9% of registrants.
